_note: Authoritative source/version metadata per dataset, keyed by '<category>/<subcategory>' (DATA_SOURCES keys). generate-manifest.mjs reads this into the manifest's pool field; import-pool.mjs updates it on import. NCVEC amateur pools run on fixed 4-year cycles (effective July 1).

cybersecurity/security+ sy0-701.source: CompTIA exam objectives (authored; CompTIA does not publish a public item pool)

falconry/apprentice.source: U.S. state apprentice falconry exams (no national pool)

devops/core-concepts.source: Authored from official docs (Google SRE book, DORA/Accelerate, CNCF, Agile Manifesto); no public item pool

devops/containers-k8s.source: Authored from official docs (Kubernetes docs, Docker docs, CNCF); no public item pool

devops/linux.source: Authored from official docs (Linux man pages, kernel.org, Red Hat docs, FHS spec); no public item pool

devops/networking.source: Authored from official docs (RFCs, NGINX docs, Cloudflare Learning Center, MDN); no public item pool

devops/cicd.source: Authored from official docs (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins docs, Humble & Farley Continuous Delivery); no public item pool

devops/iac.source: Authored from official docs (Terraform docs, Ansible docs, Pulumi docs, Kief Morris Infrastructure as Code 2nd ed.); no public item pool

devops/cloud.source: Authored from official docs (AWS Well-Architected Framework, GCP Architecture Framework, Azure Well-Architected Framework); no public item pool

devops/observability.source: Authored from official docs (OpenTelemetry spec, Google SRE Book, Prometheus docs, Majors et al. Observability Engineering); no public item pool
